finding: CSP meta injected AFTER the first <head>; a <script> placed BEFORE the user's <head> runs pre-CSP, escaping default-src 'none' and re-opening external egress from the sandbox frame
regex /<head\b[^>]*>/i matches a decoy <!-- <head> --> comment, trapping CSP_META inside the comment (inert) so the real document loads with NO CSP — full external network open in the frame
TEST-3 only asserts the srcdoc STRING contains the CSP; it never drives an outbound request to prove the network is actually blocked (mechanism-presence, not observed effect)
TEST-4 positive control asserts static markup painted, not that the inline <script> executed; a dropped allow-scripts would still pass as 'isolation held' (false assurance)
TEST-3 title claims 'blocks external network' but verifies only the CSP string, not the blocking effect
Code view uses a plain <pre><code> with no Shiki highlighting, visually inconsistent with every other fenced code block
Code view loses Shiki highlighting other fences get, and the doc-comment's 'highlighted-ish source' claim is false
renderer registered for exact 'html' only; ```HTM / ```HTML (uppercase) fall through to a plain code block with no toggle
duplicate of the comment-decoy CSP bypass (confirmed via the security angle)
iframe hardcodes bg-white regardless of theme (bright slab in dark mode)
reviewed: copy handler try/catch mirrors the reference CodeBlock; clipboard reject → message.error; no unhandled path
reviewed: per-block local useState; controlled Segmented value=effectiveMode never fights local mode (incomplete pins code, disables preview); no cross-block leakage
reviewed: setTimeout copy-reset without cleanup matches reference idiom (React18 no-op on unmount); no races
reviewed: html-render rule container/control selectors match HtmlBlock testids; AFFORDANCE_MATRIX detector-table row matches
reviewed: labels/toasts ('html','Code','Preview','HTML copied to clipboard') consistent with the syntax CodeBlock wording
reviewed: client-only render feature, no server surface, no auth boundary touched
